<script type="rocketlazyloadscript">window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    // Listen for clicks on the Elementor menu toggle button
    $('.elementor-menu-toggle').on('click', function() {
        if ($('body').hasClass('mobile-scroll')) {
            // Remove the class if the menu is already open and toggle is clicked to close
            $('body').removeClass('mobile-scroll');
        } else {
            // Add the class when the menu is opened
            $('body').addClass('mobile-scroll');
        }
    });

    // Optionally, remove the class when clicking outside the menu or closing the menu
    $(document).on('click', function(e) {
        if (!$(e.target).closest('.elementor-menu-toggle, .elementor-menu').length) {
            $('body').removeClass('mobile-scroll');
        }
    });
});
});</script>

					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );

						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};

					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript">window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
jQuery(document).ready(function() {
    var searchWidth = '180px'; // Set your desired width here
jQuery('.search-module').css({
    width: 0,
    marginLeft: searchWidth
});
jQuery('.search-btn').on('click', function(event) {
    event.stopPropagation();
    if (!jQuery('.search-module').hasClass('show')) {
        jQuery('.search-module').addClass('show').animate({
            width: searchWidth,
            marginLeft: 0
        }, 'slow');
    } else {
        jQuery('.search-module').animate({
            width: 0,
            marginLeft: searchWidth
        }, 'slow', function() {
            jQuery('.search-module').removeClass('show');
        });
    }
});

    jQuery(document).on('click', function(event) {
        if (!jQuery(event.target).closest('.search-module').length && jQuery('.search-module').hasClass('show')) {
            jQuery('.search-module').animate({
                width: 0,
                marginLeft: searchWidth
            }, 'slow', function() {
                jQuery(this).removeClass('show');
            });
        }
    });

    jQuery('.search-module').on('click', function(event) {
        event.stopPropagation();
    });
		
		jQuery('.categories_btn').click(function(event) {
          event.preventDefault(); // Prevents default button behavior (scrolling)
                //jQuery('.blog-tab-section .e-n-tabs-heading').toggle(500);
                jQuery('.blog-tab-section .e-n-tabs-heading').toggleClass('tab-show');
          });
});
});</script>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript">window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        jQuery(document).ready(function(){
            jQuery('.side-video').click(function(){
                //var imgSrc = jQuery(this).find('img').attr('src');
                var title = jQuery(this).find('h3').text();
                var tag = jQuery(this).find('.tag').text();
                var date = jQuery(this).find('.date').text();
                var author = jQuery(this).find('.author').text();
								var yt_src = jQuery(this).find('.yt-src').text();

                //jQuery('.main-video img').attr('src', imgSrc);
								jQuery('.main-video iframe').attr('src', yt_src);
                jQuery('.main-video .video-description .tag').text(tag);
                jQuery('.main-video .video-description h2').text(title);
                jQuery('.main-video .video-description .date span').text(date);
                jQuery('.main-video .video-description .author span').text(author);
								// Handle active class
								jQuery('.side-video').removeClass('active');
								jQuery(this).addClass('active');
							// Focus on main video on mobile
								if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
										jQuery('.main-video')[0].scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
								}
            });
        });
});</script>
